text: Welcome helper_alex! Your application has been approved as a moderator. Please review our community guidelines and reach out if you have any questions.
Welcome guide_sam! Your application has been approved as an event_helper. We're excited to have you help with our community events!
Welcome newbie_kim! Your application has been approved as a member. We're glad to have you join our community!
Welcome mentor_lina! Your application has been approved as a mentor. Thank you for volunteering to help guide our community members!
